_meta.name: Document Format Bench
_meta.purpose: Held-out OOD eval. Tests PII detection inside formal-document formats: corporate memos, personal letters, contracts, medical notes, legal filings, reports. v8 catastrophically failed on Q14 (memo) of gen-bench despite finding the same PII when extracted from the document context. This bench probes that failure mode systematically.
_meta.author: Claude (in conversation), 2026-04-30, distribution-keyed (NOT failure-keyed)
_meta.scoring: GPT-4o judge, 0-100% per question, average = overall

MEMORANDUM

To: All Engineering Staff
From: Patricia Wong, VP Human Resources
Date: March 14, 2024
Re: Updated benefits enrollment

Benefits open enrollment runs through March 31. Log in at benefits.acme.com using your employee ID. For Maya Chen that's EMP-44219; for Theodore Sato, EMP-44388.

Questions: contact Patricia at p.wong@acme.com or x4421.

INTERNAL MEMO

To: Department Heads
Date: 2024-09-22
Subject: Q3 expense reporting

Please ensure all Q3 receipts are submitted via Expensify by October 5. The new approval flow routes through Maria del Carmen Ortiz (Controller, m.ortiz@firm.com, x2210) for amounts >$500. Direct billing inquiries to Vendor Relations: Ahmed El-Sayed, vendor.ops@firm.com, (415) 555-9182.

SECURITY NOTICE

To: All Staff
Date: November 8, 2024

We detected unusual login activity for the following accounts. If you are listed below, your password has been auto-rotated. Confirm via the portal:

FROM THE OFFICE OF THE CEO

Date: April 2, 2024

Team,

I'm pleased to announce that Yusuf Adamu will join us as VP of Engineering, starting May 1. Yusuf brings 15 years from his prior roles at Google and Stripe. He joins us from his most recent post at Plaid where he reported to Zach Perret. Welcome him at his new email yusuf.adamu@acme.com.

A welcome reception will be held at our SF office (450 Mission St., 8th floor) on May 3 at 5pm.

— Eleanor Nakamura, CEO

LEGAL HOLD NOTICE

From: Office of General Counsel
To: All employees in Customer Success and Sales
Date: February 19, 2024
Subject: Pending litigation — preserve documents

A litigation hold is now in effect for the matter Smith v. Acme Inc., Case No. 2024-CV-08821. Do not delete any communications related to or with the following individuals: Jonathan Smith, his attorneys at Pelletier & Cohen LLP (lead: Marie Pelletier, mpelletier@pcllp.com, (212) 555-3344), and any internal correspondence with Customer Success rep Diana Asare (d.asare@acme.com, EMP-77182).

Questions to GC at legal@acme.com or x4400.

Dear Customer Service Manager,

I am writing to formally complain about the service I received at your branch on October 14. I am Beatriz Hernández-Lopez, account holder #4729183562, and I have been a customer of First National since 2008. On the date in question, your teller (badge #1184) refused to process my deposit despite valid ID.

I can be reached at 215-555-0918 or beatriz.hl@email.com to discuss resolution. My address on file is 1421 Spruce Street, Philadelphia PA 19102.

Sincerely,
Beatriz Hernández-Lopez

Dear Billing Department,

I am disputing the charge dated September 12, 2024, on my bill (account #BCBS-9988776543). The amount of $1,247 for emergency room services is incorrect — I was admitted as an inpatient, not seen in the ER.

My details: Donald Frye, DOB 06/22/1958, MRN 3382197. Address: 4400 Westhaven Rd, Madison WI 53711. Phone: 608-555-2210. Insurance member ID 5728193477A.

Please correct the bill and re-submit to my insurance.

Sincerely,
Donald Frye

Dear Mr. Tanaka,

I am writing to follow up on my application for the Senior Designer role advertised on your career page (req #DES-2024-441). I had the pleasure of meeting your team on November 2 — Kenji Watanabe walked me through the studio, and I spoke at length with Sarah Whitfield about the brand work for the Hokkaido campaign.

My portfolio is at https://nadiacisneros.design and I can be reached at +1 (415) 555-7821 or nadia.cisneros@gmail.com.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best,
Nadia Cisneros

October 30, 2024

I am giving formal 60-day notice that I will be vacating apartment 7B at 2218 Park Avenue, New York NY 10037, on December 31, 2024. As you know, I, Jamal Washington, have been your tenant since June 2019 (lease #LEASE-2019-0612).

I'd appreciate the deposit return promptly per the lease terms.

Regards,
Jamal Washington

Date: January 15, 2025

All future correspondence regarding case CR-2024-09182 should be directed to him.

I am Karen Brigden, formerly residing at 88 Maple St., Verona NJ — but please use my attorney's address going forward.

Karen Brigden

SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND MUTUAL RELEASE

This agreement is entered into between:

Plaintiff: Hyacinth Bukowski, 2218 Linden Avenue, Saint Paul MN 55104, hyacinth.b@email.com.
Defendant: Pillar Marine Logistics, Inc., a Minnesota corporation.

In settlement of Civil Action No. 24-CV-2018 filed in Hennepin County, the parties agree:

1. Defendant shall pay $87,500 to Plaintiff via wire to Wells Fargo Bank, routing 091000019, account 7748219034 in the name of Hyacinth Bukowski.

2. Plaintiff releases all claims against Defendant arising from the incident of February 8, 2024, at 1100 Industrial Drive, Eagan MN 55121.

ORDER ON DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

Case: Reynolds v. Bramwell, 2024-PR-00882, in the Probate Court of Cook County

The Court, having considered the submissions of the parties and oral argument heard on November 4, 2024, hereby ORDERS:

1. Defendant's motion is GRANTED IN PART.
2. The estate of decedent Yolanda Reyes-Caraballo (DOB 5/14/1942, deceased 8/22/2024) shall be administered consistent with the Will dated 3/12/2018, executed at 1820 Clark Street, Evanston IL 60201.

SO ORDERED.

Honorable Patrice McCullough-Stein, Judge
Dated: November 8, 2024

INTERNAL AUDIT REPORT — Q3 2024

Report No: AUD-2024-Q3-018
Audit Lead: Tobias Gunderssen (CISA, t.gunderssen@acme.com, x4421)
Date: October 14, 2024

FINDINGS:

Finding 1 (HIGH): Privileged access to production database `prod-acme-1` was not removed within 24h of role change for the following users:
  - Henrietta Carmichael (henrietta.c@acme.com) — role change effective Sept 14, access revoked Sept 22
  - Dimitrios Papadopoulos (dimitrios.p@acme.com) — role change effective Aug 30, access revoked Sept 5

Finding 2 (MEDIUM): Quarterly access review for the AWS root account (login: aws-root@acme.com) was not completed by the deadline of August 31.

SECURITY INCIDENT REPORT

Incident #: INC-2024-1108-A
Date detected: November 8, 2024 03:42 UTC
Reporter: Wojciech Stanisław Nowakowski (SecOps, w.nowakowski@acme.com, on-call mobile +48 600 555 444)

Summary: Suspicious login activity from IP 185.220.101.47 to admin portal at 03:18 UTC. Account compromised: ben.ng@acme.com (employee Benjamin Ng, EMP-22184).

Response:
- 03:42: SIEM alert, paged on-call (Wojciech)
- 03:45: Account ben.ng@acme.com password rotated, sessions revoked
- 03:50: User Benjamin Ng contacted at +1 415 555 8821 (home), confirmed not active
- 04:15: Forensics initiated. Lead investigator: Constance Halverson (c.halverson@acme.com).

HR INVESTIGATION REPORT — Confidential

File #: HRI-2024-0812-C
Investigator: Eleni Papageorgiou-Stathis (Senior HR Investigator, e.papageorgiou@firm.com, x7821)
Date range: August 12 – September 4, 2024

Complainant: Anonymous (per company policy, name redacted from this version of the report)
Respondent: Frederick Ashworth-Pemberton (Director of Marketing, f.ashworth@firm.com, EMP-44218)
Witnesses interviewed:
  - Salima Bouzidi (Account Manager, EMP-77912)
  - Liam O'Donoghue (Designer, EMP-88102)
  - Mei-Lin Tsai-Goldberg (Project Lead, EMP-66541)

Findings: Substantiated. Recommendation: termination effective immediately with one-week notice period.

ANNUAL PERFORMANCE REVIEW — FY 2024

Employee: Saoirse Ní Mhurchú
Employee ID: EMP-99102
Reports to: Augusto Bertinotti (a.bertinotti@firm.com)
Department: Engineering — Platform
Date of review: December 5, 2024
Reviewer: Augusto Bertinotti, Engineering Director

Overall rating: Exceeds Expectations (4/5)

Pay action: Salary increase from $145,000 to $158,500 effective January 1, 2025. New direct deposit account on file: Bank of Ireland, IBAN IE29 AIBK 9311 5212 3456 78.

Development goals for FY 2025: Lead the migration of the user-service team to the new platform. Pair with mentor Theron Brookenfield (theron.b@firm.com).
